name: Do I need a lawyer for my twisted ankle from work in Saint George?
description: Yes if denied or complicated—helps maximize Utah benefits.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my twisted ankle from work in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if denied or complicated—helps maximize Utah benefits.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not always for simple claims, but yes if denied, complex, or retaliated against.** Utah Industrial Accidents Division offers info but no legal advice.[1] Key factors: Lawyers maximize benefits, handle appeals; free consults common. Insurers may lowball without one. For disputes, request Claims Resolution Conference first, then attorney.
